# Heavy Armors
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Heavy%20Armors&prop=wikitext

The heavy armor is used by the short range classes (knight, paladin and warrior). It is mostly focused on high defense and health.
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = NecroticBoneplate.png
| link = Necrotic Boneplate
| text = Necrotic Boneplate
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TitansBreastplate.png
| link = Titan's Breastplate
| text = Titan's Breastplate
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ResurrectedWarriorsArmor.png
| link = Resurrected Warrior’s Armor
| text = Resurrected Warrior’s Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BreastplateOfNewLife.png
| link = Breastplate of New Life
| text = Breastplate of New Life
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = Cheater Heavy Armor.png
| link = Cheater Heavy Armor
| text = Cheater Heavy Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = AncientStoneGuardianArmor.png
| link = Ancient Stone Guardian Armor
| text = Ancient Stone Guardian Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ThorsArmor.png
| link = Thor's Armor
| text = Thor's Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = OdinsAttire.png
| link = Odin's Attire
| text = Odin's Attire
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ArmorOfOryx.png
| link = Armor of Oryx
| text = Armor of Oryx
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CandyCoatedArmor.png
| link = Candy-Coated Armor
| text = Candy-Coated Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FireDragonBattleArmor.png
| link = Fire Dragon Battle Armor
| text = Fire Dragon Battle Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FrostCitadelArmor.png
| link = Frost Citadel Armor
| text = Frost Citadel Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ArmorOfTheFallen.png
| link = Armor of the Fallen
| text = Armor of the Fallen
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AlmandineArmorOfAnger.png
| link = Almandine Armor of Anger
| text = Almandine Armor of Anger
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = FairyPlate.png
| link = Fairy Plate
| text = Fairy Plate
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ZaarvoxsHeart.png
| link = Zaarvox’s Heart
| text = Zaarvox’s Heart
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheDrenchedArmor.png
| link = The Drenched Armor
| text = The Drenched Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = TheScavengersAttire.png
| link = The Scavenger's Attire
| text = The Scavenger's Attire
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ArmorOfTheAquaticGod.png
| link = Armor of the Aquatic God
| text = Armor of the Aquatic God
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ArmorOfTheDemonLord.png
| link = Armor of the Demon Lord
| text = Armor of the Demon Lord
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = InfinityChestplate.png
| link = Infinity Chestplate
| text = Infinity Chestplate
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = VengeanceArmor.png
| link = Vengeance Armor
| text = Vengeance Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = AbyssalArmor.png
| link = Abyssal Armor
| text = Abyssal Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AcropolisArmor.png
| link = Acropolis Armor
| text = Acropolis Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DominionArmor.png
| link = Dominion Armor
| text = Dominion Armor
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = IronMail.png
| link = Iron Mail
| text = Iron Mail
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Chainmail.png
| link = Chainmail
| text = Chainmail
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = BlueSteelMail.png
| link = Blue Steel Mail
| text = Blue Steel Mail
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SilverChainmail.png
| link = Silver Chainmail
| text = Silver Chainmail
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GoldenChainmail.png
| link = Golden Chainmail
| text = Golden Chainmail
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = PlateMail.png
| link = Plate Mail
| text = Plate Mail
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MithrilChainmail.png
| link = Mithril Chainmail
| text = Mithril Chainmail
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MithrilArmor.png
| link = Mithril Armor
| text = Mithril Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DragonscaleArmor.png
| link = Dragonscale Armor
| text = Dragonscale Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DesolationArmor.png
| link = Desolation Armor
| text = Desolation Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AnnihilationArmor.png
| link = Annihilation Armor
| text = Annihilation Armor
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
